23:
**Quest Name:** Hodstock!!! 23  
**Level:** 23  
**Class:** All  
**NPC:** Feria Huckert  
**Location:** Hodstock  

foock
---

## 🟢 PART ONE (ABILITY)
1. **Talk to Feria Huckert.**
To find **Feria**, from **FP**, head out the **north gate** and run north to **Hodstock(w)**. She sends you to **Bram D'Lizo**. To find **Bram**, coach to **Fayspires**, from **Fay coach**, head north, swim north across lake, look for a **dock, tower, and a fort area** on the north shores. From the fort, head west, the **Gypsy Camp** is not too far from the fort.

2. **Bram D'Lizo** wants **1200 tunar**. He sends you to kill a **Redheaded Bandit** (CONS yel-red?? to 23). Kill, loot, return to **Feria**.

3. **Feria** asks you to speak with her daughter, **Drew**, which rewards you with **XP, an item, and a new ability**.

> ⚠️ **NOTE:** You do not have to do the next parts of the quest if you don't want to. There will be no new ability given, just an item and XP.

---

## 🟡 PART TWO
> ⚠️ **NOTE:** To do the second part, you must have **good faction with Feria Huckert**. Kill **Cracktooth Orcs** (CONs LB) near **Bobble By The Water**. Return to **Feria** after getting **Feria faction +150**.

1. **Talk to Feria Huckert.** She sends you to **Freeport** to get a **Runic Recording** from **Merchant Yulia** (for 1200 tunar). To find **Yulia**, from the main hall in **FP**, enter **second west door**, near the ramps to the **Academy of Arcane Sciences guild**.

2. **Talk to Bram D'Lizo**, use direction given in part one. He tells you to see the **statue with the glowing shield**. Head **north from the bandit fort**.

3. The **Statue** directs you to **Greyvax's caves** to kill **Iceflesh Zombies**. Head **northwest from the statue**. Drop needed: **Tribal Pendant**. Return to **Feria** for rewards.

---

## 🔵 PART THREE
1. **Feria** sends you to a guard in **Freeport** named **Smitty**. He is guarding a door to a building.

2. **Smitty** wants **1200 tunar**. He sends you to **Bison** in **Everfrost (FreezeBlood Village Zone (NW))**. From **Halas**, go **southwest** and look for **caves in the mountains**.

3. **Bison** tells you about **Greyvax** and sends you back to **Feria**.

4. **Feria** wants the remains of **Manger MacGray** from **Greyvax's cave**. Find the room with an **"Ice Statue"**. Talk to it, release or not. Receive **ice key** and open **ice chest**.

> ⚠️ **NOTE:** Rats around the Ice Statue are tough if soloing. Kill rats (no loot), then handle the statue.

### 🎁 Rewards by Class:
- **Bards:** Hymn of Health
- **Clerics:** Goldlight Cap, Weaken Death, Goldlight Shield
- **Druids:** Mithral Vine Leggings, Ward Elements
- **Paladins:** Hopemorrow Shield, Pious Might, Hopemorrow Boots, Hopemorrow Bracers
- **Rangers:** Leggings, Nimble Grace, Axe, Gloves
- **Rogues:** Shadow Dancer's Foil, Performer's Finesse, Shadow Dancer's Boots, Shadow Dancer's Gauntlets
- **Shadowknights:** Plaguereaver's Coif, Scream of Torment, Plaguereaver's Boots
- **Shamans:** Featherlite Helm, Tribal Strength, Featherlite Tunic, Featherlite Gloves
25:
**Quest Name:** Level 25 Quests
**Level:** 25
**Class:** All/All
**NPC:** Varies, see below
**Location:** Varies, see below

---

## 🟢 Temby Quest (ABILITY)
**Quest NPC:** Dristan Blane

1. **Talk to Dristan Blane** in Hodstock and Temby, the village by the coast. He sends you to **Nascien Vladya** in the **Smiling Serpent Bar** (not Inn) in Freeport.

2. **Nascien Vladya** wants **790 Tunar** and then sends you to kill **Razuam Marus** in Wyndhaven.

3. **Razuam Marus**, from coach just CON over around the inn, he is upstairs. Kill him, loot. Return to **Dristan**.

4. **Dristan** gives you your reward: **XP, ability, and faction**.

> ⚠️ **Note:** If you need to raise your faction in Temby to get the quest, kill **Nasehir**, located in camps southwest of Freeport.

---

## 🟡 Black Swan Inn Side Quest
**Zone:** Darvor Manor
**NPC:** Apprentice Buerma

1. **Talk to Apprentice Buerma**, standing next to the Blacksmith by the Inn in DM. He sends you to kill an **Ancient Stone Golem** (CONs wht(?)).

2. To find the **Ancient Stone Golem** (Mayfly Glade zone), coach to **FW**, go down to the market area next FW and head south to the river (with the guarded bridge). Follow the river west, stay on the north banks. You will see a **guard tower**, and near that, a small river. Look north, find a **small bridge**, cross facing north. The **Golem roams near this area by the bridge**. Watch out for ADDs. Kill, loot. Return to **Buerma**.

3. **Buerma** sends you to **Ling**, who is nearby.

4. **Ling** wants **1200(?) Tunar**. Return to **Buerma**.

5. **Buerma** rewards you.

> ⚠️ **Note:** If the apprentice isn't friendly (blue face), raise faction by killing **gnolls in Blackburrow**, **Jethro's Cast**, or **bandits in Bandit Hills**.

---

## 🔵 Wyndhaven Side Quest
**Zone:** Wyndhaven
**NPC:** Mr. Bail

1. **Talk to Mr. Bail**, stands next to the Inn in Wyndhaven. He sends you to kill an **Enraged Wolf** east of town. Kill, loot, return to **Mr. Bail**.

2. **Mr. Bail** sends you to find **Danur Ironbrow**, in **Hagley-Blakedown farmlands**; on the farm in south zone of Bear Caves (TY Nathan). Coach to **Qeynos**, travel via Trade Road to Bear Cave. Find a farm with **Bethany**. **Danur Ironbrow** wants **782 tunar**. Return to **Mr. Bail**.

3. **Mr. Bail** rewards you with an **item, XP, and an ability**.
27:
**Quest Name:** Lvl 27 Quests
**Level:** 27
**Class:** All/All
**NPC:** varies, see below
**Location:** varies, see below

---

## 🟢 Part One (ABILITY)
**NPC:** Commander Dursley
**Location:** Sarek's Tower

1. **Talk to Commander Dursley**; he can be found at top of tower. Kill a **goblin fanatic**; he is inside the Tower's walled area or in a room. Loot **Scrawled Note** from the goblin. Return to **Commander Dursley**.

2. **Dursley** sends you to kill a goblin named **Skulpik** in **RunnyEye**.

3. To find **RunnyEye**: Go to **HP**, exit north gate, past the guard's gate look for the second rock on the left, turn left up the hill, head north and slightly west. Reach east-west mountain range, head west along the mountain, follow road to **RunnyEye Citadel**.

> ⚠️ **NOTE:** Road is long and winding, goblins patrolling are **CON green to 27**. Pass two guard-gates to reach citadel.

4. To find **Skulpik**: Enter main gate → north door → left, up ramp into tunnel → sharp left → sharp left at fork → across bridge → right down ramp → bottom turn right, past two piles of hay → right → left down ramp → bottom facing north, hall wraps west → door with guard, flag right side, enter → cross bridge west to Royal room/fight witchdoctor → turn right into door → false wall on right, enter → up small ramp/fight → up longer ramp/fight → past hanging flag → head west, first right → enter door with barrel right/fight (no loot) → turn right → room where **Skulpik spawns**.

> ⚠️ **NOTE:** Some see Invis, most don't. Level 27 Healer + Tank can complete without help. **Skulpik** summons 2 goblins. Most mobs **CON LB**, 1-2 **CON DB**, **Skulpik CON yellow**.

5. **Kill Skulpik** and loot **Anti-Poysin Recipe**. Return to **Commander Dursley**.

6. **Dursley** sends you to **Quando Faircoin** in **HP**. Locate church (white building past old bank).

7. **Quando Faircoin** wants **1450 tunar** for antidote. Return to **Commander Dursley**.

8. **Dursley** says **Saerk** has your reward. Go to bottom of Dursley's tower, head into the other tower. Touch **Orb**, go upstairs, **Saerk**!

9. **End:** You receive a **new ability**, **1,785,000 XP**, and an item.

---

## 🟡 Part Two
**Location:** Saerk's Tower
**NPC:** Saerk

1. Retrieve **Elemental Lexicon** and **Darkhart's Medallion** from old tower east of Melton in **Druid's Watch**. Return to **Saerk**.

> Directions: Travel east from Highbourne's east gate, follow river to **Melton**, straight shot east to tower. Lexicon upstairs, guarded by **ghost**, fight your way up, do not loot.
> Medallion down in catacombs. Avoid looting mobs; follow dirt tunnel to **Darkhart's Lair**. **Darkhart** guarded by **Fright Wolf** and **Specter**, do not loot. Kill **Darkhart**, loot **Medallion**.

2. Purchase **RED Diamond** from **Grithmil Darkstone** in Moradhim or **Tsekar** in Gree Rift. Return to **Saerk**.

3. **Reward:** 1,785,000 XP and class-specific **Ring**.
30:
**Quest Name:** Level 30 Side Quests
**Level:** Level 30
**Class:** All/All
**NPC:** varies, see below
**Location:** varies, see below

> ⚠️ **Note:** If you belong to **Group 1** (Good Races, lvl 30) you must do Quests 1, 3 & 4. If you belong to **Group 5** (Evil Races, lvl 30) you must do Quests 2 & 5.

---

## 🟢 Quest 1: Trails End Side Quest
**Zone:** Trails End
**NPC:** Two-eyed Jack

1. **Talk to Two-eyed Jack** in Trails End. From HP, go out the **South Gate**, follow road south, in south part of Trails End find small village, Jack is in one of the buildings.

2. **Jack** sends you to kill **Alpha-male Wolf** (CONs blue to white), in a cave (triggered spawn). Head back north, look for first cave to your right (east). Use invis or fight your way back. Kill, loot **Max's journal**, return to **Jack**.

3. **Jack** rewards you with a **belt of his design** and **70,000 XP**.

---

## 🟡 Quest 2: Freeport Side Quest
**Zone:** Freeport
**NPC:** Twindle Fizzmop

1. **Talk to Twindle**, merchant behind the blacksmith.

2. **Twindle** sends you to kill **Sacred Monarch** (CONs blue) in Mayfly Glade (not triggered spawn). Coach to Forkwatch (FW), head west to Mayfly Glade(W), find lighted glade with **statue of mayfly**. Kill, loot, return to **Twindle**.

3. **Twindle** wants **1600 tunar**. Rewards **Thulian Circlet**.

---

## 🔵 Quest 3: Black Swan Inn Side Quest
**Zone:** Jareds Blight
**NPC:** Finnus Sodwin

1. **Talk to Finnus**, near **Black Swan Inn** (near DM coach). From DM, follow road south, Inn is first building.

2. **Finnus** sends you to kill **Skarr** (CON yellow) in **Blackburrow dungeon**. From DM, follow road north to Gnoll Fort, then NE to dungeon entrance.

3. Enter dungeon, go to main chamber with massive hole. Small passage southwest leads to **Skarr**. Kill, loot, return to **Finnus**. ***NOTE: Shamans see through invis!***

4. **Finnus** rewards **1,084,993 XP** and **3000 tunar**.

---

## 🟣 Quest 4: Blakedown Side Quest
**Zone:** Blakedown
**NPC:** Argot Bittersteel

1. **Talk to Argot** in Blakedown. From DM, follow road south and west, first building (bar) on north side of road.

2. **Argot** sends you to find **tablet** and kill **Savage Bear** in **Al'Karad Ruins**. Follow north road out of town, road disappears briefly, continue north to ruins. Invisibility helps avoid undead.

3. Enter dungeon, head down straight back. Get **popup (tablet)**. If unvis, may need to kill mobs. Exit dungeon.

4. **Savage Bear** spawns NW or NE side of ruins. Kill, loot, return to **Argot**.

5. Rewards **789,086 XP** and **Medallion of Fortitude**.

---

## 🟠 Quest 5: Fort Seriak Side Quest
**Zone:** Fort Seriak
**NPC:** J'Lisa U'Dedne
> ⚠️ **Note:** Believed for **Evil Races only**.

1. **Talk to J'Lisa U'Dedne** in Fort Seriak. She sends you to RunnyEye to find **Quicktoe**.

2. From Highpass back door, head north over mountains, past first large hill, then west. Follow path to **RunnyEye**.

3. At citadel bridge, look for **'ichor worm'** (CON green). Jump down (invis). Three passages: go **west** (north=poxworm, east=back to citadel).

4. Encounter **'festerbug'** (CON green), message triggers. Goblin (CON dark blue) and **Jongo Quicktoe** (CON yellow) battling. Kill both. Loot **U'Dedne gem** (drops four).

5. Return to **J'Lisa U'Dedne** and receive **Hatesplint Jerkin**, **70,000 XP**, **+50 faction House of U'Dedne**, **+10 faction Indigo Brotherhood**.
33:
**Quest Name:** Muniel's Tea Garden Ability Quest
**Level:** 33
**Class:** All/All
**NPC:** varies, see below
**Location:** varies, see below

---

## 🟢 Quest 1: Muniel's Tea Garden Quest (ABILITY)
**Zone:** Muniel's Tea Garden
**NPC:** Teamaster Yismay

1. **Talk to Teamaster Yismay**, second floor of the Tea Garden. He sends you to **Killian Helnes** in Blackwater. To get to BW coach: coach to FW, go south to river with covered bridge, follow river east by southeast, BW on north bank. Evil characters: go west from Dark Solace.

2. **Killian Helnes**, in **Twin Tails Inn** in Blackwater, sends you to kill **Tobul** in Widow's Peak (SE) (CONs DB@33). Run west and slightly south from Blackwater, past troll outpost to ruins with zintec zombies (or north-northwest from Hill Giant camp). Tobul roams here. Pet-pull possible. Kill, loot recipe, return to **Yismay**.

3. **Yismay** needs **Tinsy Tea Leaves** and **Brackish Rocks**. Go to **Captain Ogofa** (Northwestern Ro (SE)), take 1625 tunar. Captain Ogofa sends you to **Captain Skorn** (next tent) to buy tea leaves. For Brackish Rocks, kill **Deathfist Riders** (CONs DB to WHT) in **Deathfist Citadel** (NE). Locate tower, kill, loot rocks, return to **Yismay**.

4. **Yismay** sends you to **Tomb of Kings (TOK)** to kill **Niktuu** (CON WHT) for **Antique Teapot**. Directions: From FP coach, go west along mountains, find mountain opening, enter, go north through winding passages to tomb entrance. Enter tomb, head straight, first dugout-tunnel, continue, second dugout-tunnel, find **Niktuu** at end. Pull into tunnel to reduce ADDs. Kill, loot.

5. Return to **Yismay**. Rewards: **2,679,818 XP**, item, and class-specific ability.

---

## 🟡 Quest 2: Bastable Village Quest
**Zone:** Bastable Village
**NPC:** Connor Dunn

1. **Talk to Connor Dunn** in Bastable, he sends you to **Cambrick Scott** in Muniel's Tea Garden. ***Note:*** Exit HP north gate to Bastable.

2. **Cambrick Scott** sells map for 1625 tunar. Return to **Connor**.

3. **Connor** sends you to **Father Manstien** in southern Blakedown. Directions: Coach to DM, follow road south, bend west through Alsops'Wall, follow west to Blakedown.

4. **Father Manstien** sends you on 3 quests:
4.1 Kill **Fledgling Vampire** (CONs yellow) in **Melissa's Tomb (Blakedown NE)**. Follow north road, tomb on right. Vampire spawns main floor, right side. Kill, loot **Blood of a Vampire**, return to **Manstien**.
4.2 Kill **Emberfly** (CONs yellow) on island in lake in **Spider Mine (E)**. Loot **Spark of an Emberfly**.

5. Return to **Manstien**. Read map halves: "Those that seek the Eye of the Wyrm must travel to Melissa's Tomb, place Key of Three, and defeat Lorx or meet doom."

6. Map directs to **kill Lorx Wyrm** (CONs yellow). Enter **Melissa's Tomb**, main room, talk to tomb (fountain), popup triggers, place objects, **Wyrm** spawns. Kill, loot eye, return to **Connor**.

7. **Connor** rewards you. Talk to chest next to him for reward.

---

## 🔵 Quest 3: Blakedown Side Quest
**Zone:** Blakedown
**NPC:** Johan Redsen

1. **Talk to Johan Redsen** in Blakedown. He sends you to kill **Keller** (CONs DB) in **Mayfly Glade (C or SW)**. Roamer. Kill, loot letter, return to **Redsen**.

2. **Redsen** sends you to **Dominic Sorelli** in Highpass near North Gate. Buy rare herbs for 1625 tunar, return to **Redsen**.

3. **Redsen** sends you to kill **Hawkblade Mercenaries** (CONs DB) in **Ferran's Hope (SW)**. From HP, south gate, southwest cross-country. Kill, loot **Golden Mayfly Idol**, return to **Redsen**. Alternate route: go to Bastable, swim south down river, burned out Blacktongue camp, southwest to mountain top, can con them there.

4. **Redsen** sends you to kill **Slith'Tar Defiler Prince** (CONs DB) in **Slith'Tar Hive (C)** to loot stinger. Coach to Hazinak, head west. Many hives, one is larger. Prince inside, guards CON LB. Kill guards (do not loot), kill Prince, loot stinger, return to **Redsen**.

5. **Redsen** rewards you.
35:
**Quest Name:** Level 35 Quests
**Level:** 35
**Class:** All/All
**NPC:** varies, see below
**Location:** Highpass Hold

**Note:** When doing Quest 1 (Ability), also track Rin Tintoggle Quest (Quest 6) to Blackburrow dungeon, Part 4.A (Yjuri) and blue-pawed Gnoll are side by side.

---

## 🟢 Quest 1: Highpass Hold Ability Quest (ABILITY)
**Zone:** Highpass
**NPC:** Dametrios Velspane

1. Talk to **Dametrios Velspane**, 2nd floor of Highpass Keep. He sends you to **Priestess Nadya** in Highpass, white church.
2. **Priestess Nadya** sends you to **Madam Thlae** in Wyndhaven (southmost hut on coast). Bring 2325 tunar. Purchase Blessed Ivory, return to Nadya.
3. Return to **Dametrios**, he sends you to **Lusciar Mekara** in Freeport inn, near southern entrance.
4. Lusciar wants (A) **Idol of Malice** and (B) **Idol of Lust**.

(A) Kill **Yjuri the Vicious** (CONs DB) in **Blackburrow** (Gnoll Cave by Gnoll fort) for Idol of Malice. Bottom left-hand tunnel, popup spawns Yjuri. Kill, loot.

(B) Kill **Tseralith** (CONs DB) in **Mu Lin's Reach**, tower of Noctix, dome plateau graveyard area, for Idol of Lust. Kill, loot.

5. Return both idols to Lusciar. Receive **Idol of Zsetikaowa**. Travel to **Pool of Tears** in Hazinak, message triggers, monster (CONs red 35) spawns. Kill, loot, return to Lusciar.
6. Return to **Priestess Nadya**, then to **Dametrios**. Rewards: **3,768,632 XP**, item, and new ability.

---

## 🟡 Quest 2: Ambrose Castor Quest
**Zone:** Highpass

1. Kill **Phorriun** (CONs yel/red?) near Bastable. Trigger spawn on hill west of river.
2. **Iulias Maphesti** in Freeport: 
  2.1 Kill **Caelduiel the Sacred** (CONs Yel) in **Al Farek Ruins**. South from MTG to Large Nasehir Village, west to blue stones, triggered spawn. Kill, loot.
  2.2 Talk to **Lelalia Shavererll** in Tembly, pay 2325 tunar. Return to Iulias.
3. Return to **Ambrose**.
4. Kill **Deiphobus** (CONs yel) in **Dark Solace** (South Crossroads). Place seal popup summons him. Kill, loot, return to Ambrose.
5. Ambrose rewards you.

---

## 🔵 Quest 3: Dunn McCabe Quest
**Zone:** Highpass

1. Talk to **Dunn McCabe**, near coachman wall. He sends you to **Duminven** in **Saerk's Tower**, bring 2325 tunar. Directions: FP coach west along east-west mountain chain, then north along south-north chain to tower.
2. **Duminven** wants 2325 tunar, sends you to kill **Spectral Guardian** (CONs WHT) in **Tomb of Kings (TOK)**. Directions: follow valley passages back to TOK entrance.
3. Spectral Guardian drops key. Use key at chest, spawns **Lich Maiden** (CONs WHT). Kill, loot faded silk gown, return to McCabe. ***Note:*** Guardian is in separate hallway away from Holciel knights/nobles.
4. McCabe sends you to **Smithy Palin** for XP reward, then **Tailor Portia** for item reward.

---

## 🟠 Quest 4: Lord Voriander Quest
**Zone:** Highpass

1. Talk to **Voriander**, he sends you to **Captain Ravensite** in barracks.
2. Ravensite sends you to **Guard Matfin**, eastern tower road.
3. Kill goblins (CONs Yel) on road. Loot **kama**, return to Ravensite.
4. Return to tower, witness **Jann Olos** interaction, get letter, return to Ravensite.
5. Kill **Jann Olos** (CONs WHT) near Bastable Inn, loot letter, return.
6. Kill **Goblin Hijacker** (CONs Yel) in Moss Mouth (C) cave near Bastable river. Loot crate, return to Ravensite.
7. Ravensite wants 2325 tunar. Return to **Voriander**.
8. Voriander rewards you.

---

## 🟣 Quest 5: Fender Crow Quest
**Zone:** Highpass

1. Kill **Dumak Olivarn** (CONs WHT) in Bastable. Loot paper stating stone is in **Tomb of Kings (TOK)**. Return to Fender.
2. Kill **Grave Robber Laen** (CONs WHT) in TOK. Triggered spawn, beware invis. Kill, loot, return.
3. Go to **Smithy Palin** in HP keep for reward.
4. Pay 2250 tunar to Smithy, then visit **Tailor Portia**.
5. Tailor Portia rewards you.

---

## 🟤 Quest 6: Rin Tintoggle Quest
**Zone:** Highpass

1. Kill **Model LXI** (CONs WHT/Yel?) near Moradhim hill with marker stone. Kill, loot, return.
2. Buy battery from **Merchant Samwe** in Klick'Anon for 2325 tunar. Return to Rin.
3. Kill **Blue-pawed Gnoll** (CONs WHT/Yel?) in Blackburrow, room above dwarf temple, bottom left-hand tunnels near Black/Redpaw spawns, left-hand tunnel popup. Kill, loot, return.
4. Kill **MODEL LXIX** (CONs Yel) in Trail's End village, exit HP south gate, follow road, LXIX spawns outside city. Kill, loot black box, return.
5. Rin rewards you.
37:
**Quest Name:** Level 37 Quests
**Level:** 37
**Class:** All/All
**NPC:** varies, see below
**Location:** varies, see below

---

## 🟢 Quest 1: Min Gyrind Quest (ABILITY)
**Zone:** Oasis
**Note:** Improve gypsy faction via Siloth or Nasehir kills if quest unavailable.

1. Talk to **Min Gyrind** (east wall Oasis), she sends you to **Rivard Gyrind** (west wall Oasis).
2. Rivard sends you to **Ralis** in Brog Fens (BW, Black Water) for a vial, bring 2556 tunar. Return to Rivard.
3. Rivard sends you to **Slithtar Hive (N)** to retrieve nectar from **Slithtar Reviver** (CONs Wht). Kill, loot, return Rivard.
4. Rivard sends you to **Sycamore Joy's Rest** to kill **Weary Treant** (CONs Wht) for sap. Kill, loot, return Rivard.
5. Rivard sends you to **Ant Colonies (S)** to kill **High Guard Ianant** (CONs Yel) for chalice. Be invised. Kill, loot, return Rivard.
6. Return to **Min Gyrind**, dig for reward: **4,140,484 XP**, item, and new ability.

---

## 🟡 Quest 2: Rigo Dartar Quest
**Zone:** Oasis
**Note:** Improve gypsy faction if quest unavailable.

1. Talk to **Rigo** (tent by river), he sends you to **Gykard** (tree outside Taksehir stronghold), bring 2556 tunar.
2. Kill **Nasehir Poison Keeper** (CONs Yel) in Sea of Lions tunnels. Kill, loot, return Gykard.
3. Kill **Mardtirn Poisontongue** outside Freeport NW, follow FP north gate west.
4. Kill **Deathfist Trader** (CONs DB) in **Deathfist Citadel** (DFC). Kill, loot paste, return Mardtirn.
5. Visit **Elmo Haggar** in Bastable.
6. Kill **Blacktongue Ravager** (CONs WHT) in **Ferran's Hope** (FH) for Lantern. Return Elmo, then Mardtirn, then Rigo.
7. Talk to **Luvincius' Servant** behind tower. Return Rigo.
8. Rigo rewards you.

---

## 🔵 Quest 3: Svenle Dormio Quest
**Zone:** Oasis
**Note:** Improve gypsy faction if quest unavailable.

1. Talk to **Svenle**, he sends you to **Enrique Reynold** at gypsy camp north of Forkwatch.
2. Pay 2550 tunar for necklace. Return to Svenle.
3. Kill **Chief Graymoon** in Burial Mounds. Directions: south from Oasis to river, west at river, turn left at dam, kill, loot.
4. Kill **Mayssa**, necromancer near **Magifent's Mausoleum** in Stone Watchers zone. Kill, loot, return Svenle.
5. Kill **Troi Respin** in Widow's Peak tombs (SE). Invis recommended. Kill, loot, return Svenle.
6. Visit Svenle's brother for reward.
43:
**Quest Name:** Level 43 Quests
**Level:** 43
**Class:** All/All
**NPC:** varies, see below
**Location:** Eternal Desert
**Note:** You may wish to wait on completing this quest. The Tomb Keeper in step 2 is in the same location as Akuion, needed for Level 45 Ability quest. Advance this quest to the cultist's barrow, then log your lvl 45 to get both mobs.

---

## 🟢 Quest 1: Eternal Desert Ability Quest (ABILITY)
**Zone:** Eternal Desert - Monk Tower
**NPC:** Royce Sandstalker

1. Talk to **Royce** near the tower in Eternal Desert (north, slightly west from Oasis coachman). He sends you to kill **Growthor** (CONs Wht), an evil treant southwest of the Eternal Tower in the dead forest, Tak 'Xiz South (NE). Kill, loot, return Royce.
*NOTE* Easier to run SW from here to get Tae Ew Scavenger since it's in same zone.

2. Kill an undead **Tomb Keeper** in the cultist barrow of **Thenon the Wise** for sinew. Barrow is along the river between Forkwatch and Darvar Manor. Cave east of FW, or south of DM on west river bank. Cultists see invis, immediate respawn if looted. Half are casters. Werebeast: turn into first form to make them neutral. First room, left hallway, next left leads to Tomb Keeper guarded by four level 44 ghouls. Kill, loot, return Royce.

3. Kill **Tae Ew Scavenger** (CONs Wht) in Tae Ew camp, Tak`Xiz South (SW). Surrounding mobs have large aggro. Kill, loot, return Royce.

4. Talk to **Ravarld** in Highpass (north gate). Bring 2652 tunar. Return to Royce.
5. Royce rewards with XP, item, and new ability.

---

## 🟡 Quest 2: Joyce Sandstalker Quest
**Zone:** Eternal Desert - Monk Tower

1. Talk to **Joyce**, she sends you to kill **Crazed Mage** (CONs WHT) in **Darvar Manor (DM)**, west area called Crazed Experiments. Triggered spawn. Kill, loot orb, return Joyce.
2. Kill **Flamekeeper** (CONs WHT) in **Cazic Thule**, northern temple. Kill, loot fire rune, return Joyce.
3. Kill **Frost Fur**, a bear, in caves far north **Snowblind Plains (NE)**. Cave marked with blue-glowing stones. Kill, loot fur, return Joyce.
4. Talk to **Ravarld** in northern HP. Bring 2652 tunar. Return to Joyce.
5. Joyce rewards.

---

## 🔵 Quest 3: Broyce Sandstalker Quest
**Zone:** Eternal Desert - Monk Tower

1. Talk to **Broyce**, he sends you to kill **Taksehir Craftsman** (CONs Yel) in **Burial Mounds (C)**. Kill, loot, return Broyce.
2. Kill **Lost Froglok** (CONs Yel) in **dungeons of Guk**. Kill, loot, return Broyce. Map to Lost Froglok.
3. Kill **Aggravated Spirit** (CONs Yel) in **Widow's Peak (SE)**. Triggered spawn near ruins where you find Tobul. Kill, loot, return Broyce.
4. Talk to **Ravarld** in northern compartment of HP. Bring 2652 tunar. Return Broyce.
5. Broyce rewards.
45:
**Quest Name:** Level 45 Quests
**Level:** 45
**Class:** All/All
**NPC:** varies, see below
**Location:** Castle Lightwolf

---

## 🟢 Quest 1: Castle Lightwolf Ability Quest (ABILITY)
**Zone:** Castle Lightwolf
**NPC:** Gate Guard Parilin

1. Talk to **Gate Guard Parilin** in the southwest tower on ground floor. He sends you to talk to the **Black Gate of Muan' Diel**, which teleports you to Mila's Reef. Climb up the nearest rib and talk to **Old Man Antiok**.

2. Old Man Antiok wants 3 tasks done:

**Task 1:** Kill **Marrow Maw** (CONs LB), a squid just below you. [Kratas quest spawns here—log while you're here]. Kill, loot, return to Antiok. Squid is LB, has poison.

**Task 2:** Kill pirate **Captain Soohn** (CONs LB) on nearby island north of Antiok. Other pirates are present. Kill, loot, return to Antiok.

**Task 3:** Go to the lighthouse north, purchase coals for 2900 tunar. Merchant there can sell food/drink/loot if needed. Return to Antiok.

3. Kill **Akuion** (CONs Wht) at the **Cultist's Barrow**, same location as Level 43 Royce quest. Entrance, first room, left hallway, then right hallway. Triggered spawn. Kill, loot, return to Parilin.
*Note:* Cultists see invisibility, immediate respawn if looted, half are casters. Werebeast: first form makes them neutral.

4. Talk to **Gate Guard Chastis** for reward: 6722242 XP, item, new ability.

---

## 🟡 Quest 2: Ambassador Kizden G`Lux Quest
**Zone:** Castle Lightwolf - North Wilderlands

1. Talk to **Ambassador Kizden G'Lux** (first floor, north tower). He sends you to kill 3 rivals (all CONs WHT):

1.1 **Ambassador Do'Nerua** in Darvar Manor, by coachman, front room. Pull outside before attacking. Kill, loot seal, return to Kizden.

1.2 **Ambassador Vu'Malik** in Freeport, near docks, north of waysender. Kill, loot seal, return.

1.3 **Ambassador Ma'Dalik** in Guk, deep dungeon past lost froglok, across fungal bridge, into room with froglok wizards/shamans. Kill, loot seal, return. Map of Guk.

2. Talk to **Merchant Urlant**, across room from Kizden, buy calligraphy set for 2923 tunar. Return to Kizden.
3. Kizden rewards.

*Note:* Must have 150 faction with CLW to get quest. Obtain faction by slaying beasts in Lady Vox's Castle, Permafrost.

---

## 🔵 Quest 3: Pandrig Fultin Quest
**Zone:** Castle Lightwolf - North Wilderlands

1. Talk to **Pandrig Fultin** (third floor, west tower). He sends you to **Quinton** at the Inn, crossroads, just west of Castle Lightwolf. Follow road west.

2. Quinton wants 2875 tunar, sends you to **Snow Guardian Clouwe** in Halas (outside west guard tower).

3. Clouwe sends you to kill **Glacier** (CONs Yel), giant polar bear, NE of Zentar's Keep, Permafrost (SE). Kill, loot pelt, return to Clouwe.
*Note:* Glacier sees invis.

4. Clouwe sends you to **Chef Tallik** in Wyndhaven Inn.
5. Chef Tallik sends you to kill **Great Worms** (CONs LB to Yel). You need 3 chunks of ice worm meat. Random spawns NW/E of ZK. Kill, loot, return.

6. Chef Tallik sends you to **Olivia McFadden** (CONs Yel) in **Anu Village (N)**. Icetomb by lake/broken bridge. She walks mid-room; kill, loot sword, return to Pandrig.

7. Pandrig rewards.

*Note:* Must have 150 CLW faction to get quest, obtained by slaying beasts inside Lady Vox's Castle in Permafrost.
47:
**Quest Name:** Gramash Ruins Quests
**Level:** 47
**Class:** All/All
**NPC:** Grimm Brellhand
**Location:** Gramash Ruins (S)

---

## 🟢 Quest 1: Gramash Ruins
**NPC:** Grimm Brellhand
*Ability part is Quest 2—but you must complete Quest 1 first*

1. Talk to **Grimm Brellhand**. Coach to Murnf, run NE to Gramash Ruins (S). Grimm is in the blacksmith house. Use invis to avoid mobs.
2. Find ore: talk to **Head Foreman Zeke** in Gerntars Mine, help with minotaurs.
3. Buy pickaxe for 3000 tunar from **Quartermaster Malda**, equip, head to Minotaur caves. Use invis.
4. In first cave, go to back, get popup to dig.
5. Skip second cave, go to third cave. Ends of both tunnels: get 2 more ores.
6. Talk to **Gilthirn Ironhoof** in third cave. He tells you about **Khelmarak**.
7. Go to back of second cave, popup spawns **Khelmarak** (Lvl 48-49, sees invis). Kill, loot horn; 6 minotaurs appear, no agro.
8. Talk to **Gilthirn Ironhoof** again, give horn, gain HUGE faction with minotaurs.
9. Return to **Zeke** to OK ores.
10. Return to **Grimm**.
11. Grimm sends you to **Cazic Thule (N)** temple.
12. Drop into pyramid, find Excavator & Tunneler.
13. Tunneler: deadend hallway with 3 Tae Ew facing wall; kill placeholder till spawn.
14. Excavator: sunken floor room, 2 door guards, 2 ramp guards, Stone Golem, 2 Tae Ew, 1 roamer. Spawn directly across from Golem. Placeholder middle guy. *NOTE:* Spawns may take time. Pull mobs one at a time to safe corner; detailed pull instructions provided.
15. Once both ores obtained, return to **Grimm** for class reward & 7,083,126 XP.

---

## 🟡 Quest 2: Gramash Ruins (ABILITY)
**NPC:** Grimm Brellhand

1. Talk to **Grimm Brellhand**. He wants **Ball of Everfrost** & **Ancient Bottle of Elven Wine** to summon **Margun Leafstrider**.
*NOTE:* Pre-obtain items before logging quest.

A. Elven Wine: Buy in Freeport for 3000 tunar from **Merchant Gilgash**.
B. Ball of Everfrost: Drops from **Ice Goblin Melder** (CONs YEL) in **Permafrost (N)**, Vox Castle. Goblin Shamans & Wizards see invis; need full group.

2. Navigate castle halls, kill placeholders until **Melder** spawns, avoid roamers.
3. Take Ball & Wine back to **Grimm**.
4. Find hollow tree in **Gramash Ruins (C)**, north of Grimm, perform summoning. Margun Leafstrider spawns; branch located SW of Holciel Rowen'Dal.
5. Find **Tilmiraen** in Deathfist Forge (NW). Small bowl valley north of first hill. He gives branch after agreeing to help.
6. Teleport to **Twisted Towers (S) Fairy Village**; illusion to fairy form.
*NOTE:* If you die, lose fairy form; must return to Tilmiraen to retry.
7. Find **Mugwort** (far east mushroom house), speak, return to original teleport point, con "tiny door" to Tilmiraen.
8. Speak with **Tilmiraen**, instructed to kill **Twizzletwig** in **Takish'Hiz (SW)**.
9. Twizzletwig (Lvl 50) triggered spawn; get popup SE near blue lake, run south past 4 small pillars, he spawns walking on road. Kill, loot Potion of Ever-Rot.
10. Return to **Tilmiraen**, receive one root.
11. Return to **Grimm** for class item, new spell/ability, XP.

---

## 🔵 Quest 3: Gramash Ruins
**NPC:** Grimm Brellhand

1. Talk to **Grimm**. Hammer broke, needs Thulite for new anvil.
2. Go to **Cazic Thule (N)** temple, enter, right side of pyramid, kill **Dark Elf Miner**, loot mining log.
3. Return log to **Grimm**.
4. Go to **Guk**, find **Maerik N'Toxis** in castle bottom of Froglok cave. Use invis; avoid Fungal Elders. Kill placeholders until Maerik spawns (drops 2 scrolls). *Note:* Spawns can take 1-10 hours.
5. Return scrolls to **Grimm**.
6. Go to **Highpass**, find **Feldink Shortquill** (2nd floor, tower where Lord Voriander is), pay 3000 tunar to translate.
7. Return to **Grimm**, he instructs to reanimate **Thulite Golem**; need **Golem Part A & B** from Golem Protectors.
8. Go to **Tak'Xiv (SW)**. Golem Protectors spawn inside hut on walkway, level 48-49, can't see invis. Pull one at a time.
9. With parts, activate **Thulite Golem**. Level 50, kills player, drops 4 Huge Chunks of Thulite.
10. Return to **Grimm**, reward: XP & class item.
Title: 23-47 (Ability & Side Quests) and test!
SubTitle: Each level bracket containers multiple quests, only 1 providing the ability you need for your class. The rest are optional quests that provide XP and gear rewards.
